I am going to book my flights.

We are going to save up this year.
It is raining? OK, I will take a taxi.
Do not worry, I will help you pack.
So, where are we going to go next? I think we are going to need a real plan this time.
So do I! I am going to book the flights this week. First, let us set a budget.
Good idea. I will save up a little more this month, then. What about the hotel?
I am going to find a small one near the old town. I have a brochure with some great options.
Perfect. Do not worry about the packing list -- I will make one for both of us.
Thank you! I can not wait. I am really looking forward to this one.

Next month I am going to take the trip of my dreams. I have a plan for everything. First, I am going to book my flights and find a small hotel near the old town. I am also going to save up a little more money, because I want to enjoy good food without worrying about my budget. I have a long packing list, and I am going to start early this time. I am really looking forward to it. To be honest, the planning is almost as fun as the trip itself. I can't wait to see new places and meet new people.

For years, I never planned my trips. I just packed a bag and left, and something always went wrong. I missed a flight once because I had no plan at all. So I changed. Now I make a simple plan before every trip. I set a small budget, I write a packing list, and I book the important things early. If a problem comes up, I do not panic. I will find a solution, I tell myself. Planning does not take the magic away. It gives me time to relax and enjoy the journey. I am going to plan my next trip this weekend, and I can't wait.

First, Tânia decides on the destination and sets a budget. Then she books her flights early to save money. Next, she writes a long packing list so she forgets nothing. After that, she and her friend plan the days together. Finally, they look forward to the trip and can't wait to leave.
